description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for PG-126 public onboarding tour + feedback widget. All 13 net-new artefacts (tour-components.tsx, feedback-widget-public.tsx, feedback-service.ts, tour-storage.ts, public-onboarding.ts, public-feedback router/service, public-rate-limiter.ts, PublicFeedbackRepositoryPort.ts, prisma-public-feedback-repository.ts, onboarding-config.json, Prisma PublicFeedback model, PublicFeedback migration) do not yet exist on disk, so their baseline is empty by construction. The three modified files (tracking-pixel.ts, public layout.tsx, features page.tsx, home page.tsx) carry their current HEAD coverage into this task; scoped after-capture will measure the delta.
notes: All 10 primary scope files are net-new; baseline is empty by construction.
tracking-pixel.ts receives two additive exports (trackTourStarted, trackTourSkipped); current coverage is retained from its existing test file and will only increase post-implementation.

After-implementation coverage will be recorded in artifacts/coverage/PG-126-after.json, with scoped thresholds (Statements >= 90%, Branches >= 80%, Functions >= 90%, Lines >= 90%) enforced at exec Phase 4.5 Gate 9.
